scenario: Police arrest without warrant at home

rights.description: Right to know grounds of arrest
Right to be produced before Magistrate within 24 hours

scripted_phrase.phrase: I am invoking my right under Section 41D CrPC. I request to speak to a lawyer.

rights.description: Right to clear identification of arresting officer
Right to inform a relative about detention
Right to life and personal liberty

scripted_phrase.phrase: Please show your identification and prepare an arrest memo as per D.K. Basu guidelines.

rights.description: Right to reside in shared household
Right to protection orders against violence
Right to file complaint for cruelty

scripted_phrase.phrase: I am seeking protection under the Domestic Violence Act. I have a right to stay in this house.

scenario: Illegal eviction by landlord without notice

rights.description: Right to 15 days notice for month-to-month lease
Protection against criminal trespass by landlord
Right to injunction against illegal eviction

scripted_phrase.phrase: You cannot evict me without a court order and proper notice. This is criminal trespass.

scenario: Employer not paying salary for 2 months

rights.description: Responsibility of employer to pay wages
Right to receive payment by the 7th or 10th of the month
Right to file claim for delayed wages

scripted_phrase.phrase: I am entitled to my wages under the Payment of Wages Act. I will file a claim with the Labour Commissioner.

rights.description: Limited liability for unauthorized digital transactions
Right to file complaint with Consumer Commission

scripted_phrase.phrase: I am reporting this unauthorized transaction within the RBI-mandated timeframe to ensure zero liability.
